theoremName: augmented finite Schur interval constants theorem

finiteTraceQuotientIntervalStatus.label: finite trace quotient interval dimensions
finiteTraceQuotientIntervalStatus.reason: The augmented finite trace model has a resolved positive trace rank.

finiteRangeResidualIntervalStatus.label: finite Schur range residual interval
finiteRangeResidualIntervalStatus.reason: The range residual center plus the explicit interval radius is below the certificate tolerance.

finiteDaugNonnegativeIntervalStatus.label: finite D_aug,N nonnegative interval
finiteDaugNonnegativeIntervalStatus.reason: D_aug,N is analytically a positive scalar times a trace Gram/projection construction; the interval check verifies the observed negative spectral endpoint is roundoff within the stated ball radius.

finiteSchurGapIntervalStatus.label: finite Schur complement interval gap
finiteSchurGapIntervalStatus.reason: The Schur complement lower endpoint remains positive after subtracting the interval radius.

finiteRepairedFormIntervalStatus.label: finite repaired form interval lower endpoint
finiteRepairedFormIntervalStatus.reason: The repaired form lower endpoint remains positive after subtracting the interval radius.

finiteMuAnnihilationIntervalStatus.label: finite Mu kernel annihilation interval
finiteMuAnnihilationIntervalStatus.reason: The Mu action center plus interval radius is below the annihilation tolerance.
